flyers_description: Phrinta iphepha le-Bitcoin ekhaya bese ulibeka emphakathini ukuze u-orange pill abakuzungezile.
flyers_intro_header: INDLELA YOKUPHRINTA & YOKUNAMATHISELA LA MAPHEPHA E-BITCOIN
flyers_intro_c1: Umgomo wethu ukukusiza u-orange pill abantu abaningi ngokubeka amaphepha e-Bitcoin emphakathini. Leli phepha linekhodi ye-QR exhumana ne
flyers_intro_c4: Phrinta leli phepha ekhaya noma endaweni yokuphrinta. Bese ulibeka emabhodi wezimemezelo, ezinsikeni zocingo edolobheni, nasezinye izindawo zomphakathi lapho abantu bengalibona futhi bafunde nge-Bitcoin.
flyers_intro_c5: Ngenkathi ukwenza, cela iphakethe lethu le
flyers_intro_c7: ukuze usize u-orange pill abantu abaningi.
flyers_share_c1: Yabelana ngezindawo zamaphepha akho nathi ku-Nostr futhi ubone ukuthi abanye abantu babeka kuphi amaphepha abo.
